case_title: JOSEPH NORTHINGTON VS. MARIA LUISA LUNA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHINGTON, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, MARIA LUISA $841.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $841.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
